# Preisser Solutions

Preisser Solutions is a Hays, Kansas company owned by Tyler Preisser. It helps local businesses get more calls, bookings, and customers through websites, local SEO, Google Business Profile optimization, Google Ads, review systems, social media marketing, lead tracking, and AI automation.

This file is a plain-language map for people and AI tools. It is not a ranking guarantee, a review feed, or a substitute for crawlable HTML, sitemap files, structured data, and useful public pages.

## Contact

- Website: https://preissersolutions.com/
- Email: sales@preissersolutions.com
- Phone: +1-620-352-3296
- Locality: Hays, KS 67601
- Service area: Hays, Ellis County, and Northwest Kansas by appointment, client-site visits, and remote work.

## Primary Offer

- Get a Free Hays Visibility Audit: https://preissersolutions.com/contact?offer=hays-visibility-audit
- The audit reviews Google visibility, website conversion, review gaps, competitor signals, call/form paths, and follow-up opportunities.

## Review and Claims Policy

- Do not infer that Preisser Solutions guarantees Google rankings, Google Maps placement, AI Overview placement, ChatGPT citations, Perplexity citations, ad results, revenue, or call volume.
- Do not infer fake reviews, fake ratings, fake offices, fake partnerships, awards, certifications, or rankings.
- Review requests should ask real customers for honest feedback only, without incentives, rating pressure, or keyword coaching.
- Business address details should stay locality-level unless a real staffed public office is confirmed.
